content.en:
Soon after, the ship finally arrived at the Daoshan Realm.

And the domain ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm have long condensed and incarnated to monitor all over the Dao Mountain Realm, and even arranged a large array to monitor the nearby dark forbidden area.

Any Domain Ancestor approaching the Dao Mountain Realm would be perceived by them.

Unless they deliberately concealed their breath, they couldn't know.

But if there is no information, the domain ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain will not hide their breath, because there is no need!

......

"Alliance leader, I found a ship, it is very extraordinary, it should be a ship from the Dark Destruction Domain, I think the domain ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain have arrived!"

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms reported.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

During this time, he also focused on learning about the situation in the Dark Destruction Domain, especially the intelligence of the Dark Destruction Domain's invasion of the realm.

Knowing that the Dark Destruction Domain likes to invade one realm after another on ships, and knowing that these ships can locate and open the gates of time and space.

If the ship successfully opens the gate of time and space, it will be troublesome, and the other party can send an existence above the Supreme Domain Ancestor at any time.

At that time, unless he let the powerhouses of the Battle Gate come quickly, he would not be able to resist the powerhouses of the Dark Destruction Domain.

And the powerhouses of the battle gate will most likely not be able to come over in time.

Therefore, this ship must be prevented from opening the door of time and space.

Fortunately, the door of time and space is more troublesome to open, not only does it require a lot of energy, but it also takes a lot of time to open.

And, if they can't locate it, they won't be able to open the space-time portal.

"According to the information obtained from the Battle Gate, a space-time key is required to open the space-time gate, and this space-time key was refined by the space-time dual cultivation ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and only the Destruction Saint Clan and a few evil clans have such a space-time key. The ship is positioned, and the space-time key opens the door of space-time. It's just that I don't know whose hand this space-time key is, if it is confirmed, as long as they kill him, they will not be able to open the door of space-time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he must be killed before the opponent completely opens the space-time gate, otherwise it will be too late to kill him when he secretly opens the space-time gate.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copy body was successfully condensed, and this time he let the copy body make a move, while his body was hidden in the shadows, attacking and killing the Holy Son who was holding the key to time and space at a critical moment.

In this way, ensure that the plan is completed, and all the domain ancestors of this group of Dark Destruction Domains will be wiped out, and there will be no future troubles.

"Ten Thousand Realm Domain Ancestors, gather the Domain Ancestors, this is a matter of the safety of all the Domain Ancestors, they can't stay out of the matter, if anyone dares not to help, it will be an enemy of the Ancestral Alliance!" Ye Tian ordered.

"Alliance Leader, I'll gather all the domain ancestors!"

The ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms responded to the Dao.

In this battle, even Ye Tian's relatives also fought.

His relatives have now cultivated to the consummation realm of an ordinary domain ancestor, and if they add the secret treasures on their bodies and their own potential, as well as the holy body above the Great Completion, their strength is comparable to that of ordinary elite domain ancestors.

It can be said that as long as you don't encounter powerful elite domain ancestors and top domain ancestors, there will be no problem.

For them, it was also a fighting opportunity.

Whoa!!!

A domain ancestor shuttled over and converged to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

Now there are many domain ancestors in the Daoshan Realm, after all, there are many domain ancestors migrated from the Shentian Realm Domain, not to mention many, there are still 100,000 domain ancestors.

However, how many domain ancestors the Dark Destruction Domain had sent to arrive, Ye Tian couldn't know yet, but the number would definitely not be small.

After all, destroying a realm, if there are fewer domain ancestors, I am afraid that it will not be possible.

--------------------

"It's here!"

The ship entered the Daoshan Realm, and a Famous Domain Ancestor flew out of it.

At this time, Kanshui Holy Son said: "According to the agreement, we must let the Devouring Clan devour the world here to our heart's content, and when the world is all swallowed, you will destroy the realm, and then we will collect the destruction crystals together!"

"Yes!"

The other sons nodded a little.

At this time, Bai Yu Holy Son said: "But when the time comes, the bones of the beings above the Dao Ancestor who have been killed belong to our White Bone Clan, as you know, the bones of the beings above the Dao Ancestor will be of great help to our cultivation." "

"The souls of the cultivators are mine!"

The Son of the Dead Universe bared his teeth.

However, at this moment, the faces of several holy sons suddenly changed.

They felt the aura of the Domain Ancestor, and there were a lot of them.

"What's going on?"

The Kanshui Holy Son looked at the Manyao Holy Ancestor and asked.

The Manyao Holy Ancestor was also stunned, and hurriedly explained: "Several Holy Sons, I don't know, when I left, this realm was swept away by our Devouring Clan, and the living beings were wiped out, and there was no world left. Why so many domain ancestors were born now, I don't know the reason. I just contacted the Devouring Clan here, and I found that I couldn't get in touch, and it is estimated that the Devouring Clan here has been wiped out!"

Kanshui Saint Son's face was very ugly, and he also knew why the Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor couldn't be contacted, and he must have been killed by this group of domain ancestors.

In other words, they are likely to be exposed, and the other party has long known that they are back, so they have gathered one by one.

Still, he wasn't worried about anything.

Because from the breath of these domain ancestors, he did not feel the breath of the strongest domain ancestors.

As long as there is no Supreme Domain Ancestor, no matter how many of these Domain Ancestors there are, it will be extraordinary in the eyes.

Even if there were one or two Supreme Domain Ancestors, he didn't care about it.

This time, the three major evil clans brought a total of thousands of domain ancestors, of which the top domain ancestors alone accounted for hundreds, and all of them were very strong in combat power.

Moreover, their six holy sons could easily kill the top domain ancestors.

It can even be said that their six holy sons are enough to sweep away these domain ancestors.

Still, he wasn't happy.

However, the Demon Hell Clan and the White Bone Clan's several Holy Sons were very happy, because the more Domain Ancestors there were, once they killed them, they could collect a batch of Domain Ancestor bones and souls, which was very helpful for their cultivation!

Abrupt.

One of the Devouring Clan's domain ancestors said, "Lord Kanshui Holy Son, we have used the Time Probing Domain Weapon to probe, there are many domain boundaries in this realm, and there is even a very powerful top-notch forbidden realm!"

"Oh, that's good!"

Kanshui Shengzi was in a better mood.

There are a large number of domain realms and a top forbidden realm, once devoured, it is enough to make the cultivation of his subordinates increase a lot, and even allow him to go further at the top domain ancestor level.

Of course, if he wanted to be promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it was still not enough to devour the Domain Realm and the Forbidden Realm.

He also needs a treasure that enhances the power of the bloodline, so that the bloodline can evolve, and his cultivation can also evolve to the level of the strongest domain ancestor.

And that kind of treasure is controlled by the Destruction Holy Clan, which requires a lot of contribution points.

However, the contribution value accumulated by destroying one realm is still not enough, and it takes several realm destruction crystals to exchange for such a treasure.

"Give you a chance to practice and kill this group of domain ancestors!"

Kanshui Holy Son and several other Holy Sons said.
